dialogos.texto_en: Ah! \nBig bro, Itsuki-san!
Hi there.\nDid you two come to check out this shop?
No, we just saw you two over here.\nWere you looking at the accessories?
Well, what they have here are not exactly accessories,\nbut rather charms, amulets and talismans\nthat have been passed down in Okinawa.
Oh, Okinawan amulets, huh?\nI'm not very familiar with them.\nWhat kind are there?
Is this one an amulet too?\nIt's just a really simple strap.
I mean,\nit looks like it's just made\nby tying knots with leather.
When you don't know something,\nit's best to just ask.
Um, excuuse mee.
Yes!
Is this strap also an amulet?
That there is a 'sangwa' talisman made of leather.
What kind of talisman is a 'sangwa'?
Simply put, it's a charm that protects \nagainst evil spirits.\nIt's often given to children to carry with them.
It can also be placed on top of a bento\nto protect food from being spoiled by majimun.
Majimun...
'Majimun' is the Okinawan word for 'evil spirit.'
It's been passed down for generations, and originally,\nit was made by tying together susuki grass leaves.
Thank you very much for the information.\nI've learned a lot.
To make a talisman from susuki grass leaves that can be \nfound everywhere is truly like a protection all around us.
Ah! This bag-like thing over here is cute too.
Is this one an amulet then?\nIt looks like the ones you find in shrines or temples.
Oh, that's called a 'maasu' bag, ya know.
'Maasu' means 'salt,' and as the name suggests,\nthat's what it contains.
Oooh~.
Salt is often used for protection against evil spirits.
Of course, but it's also used as a good luck charm\nor for matchmaking by attaching it to a wallet or a bag.
I see. Thank you for telling us so much.
You're welcome. If you have any more questions,\nfeel free to ask.
Thank you very much.
These baggies are certainly just the right size to attach\nto a bag. There's just so many colors and patterns\nto choose from...
Itsuki-chan, do you like it?\nWhy don't you two buy matching ones?
Matching ones?!
Woah?!\nWhat's up, all of a sudden?
Matching, huh? That's really nice, isn't it?\nW-what should we do? Should we buy them?
That's a little too cute for me...\nIt would be weird if I had this on my bag, wouldn't it?
Th-that's not true!\nI think it looks good, and if you use it,\nyou'll get used to it!
*sigh* Well, I suppose so.
So, let's match!
Well, if you're gonna say that much.
There are a lot of options. What about the colors?\nThey're all so lovely, I can't decide.
Alrighty!\nUesu%p-2;――%p; Futaro,\nplease choose one too.
Got it.\nI want a color that's not too cute for mine, though.
There are a lot of options,\nso we could get different colors, eh.\nOr we could each pick our favorite color.
Okay!
Nice, big bro!\nThat reply right now was exactly like a boyfriend.
(Exactly like a boyfriend...)
It's okay, Raiha-chan.\nF-Futaro will always...\nbe a good boyfriend for me.
Futaro-kun, you're blushing, you know?
Pretend you've seen nothing...
Alright, let's buy matching baggies!
There are a lot of options. What about the colors?\nThey're all so lovely, I can't decide.
Alrighty!\nUesu%p-2;――%p; Futaro,\nplease choose one too.
Got it.\nI want a color that's not too cute for mine, though.
We don't really need them, right?
...What do you mean?\nDo you not want to get matching ones with me?
That's not it.\nIt's just that%p-2;――
If it's fate, then we're already connected, right?\nSo we don't need charms like these.
I-I see. We don't need to pray for protection\nfor our relationship, because we're already...
...Yup.
Did you hear that, Raiha-chan?\nFutaro-kun's pickup line was incredible.
I heard it, I heard it.\nIt was so impactful\nthat I couldn't believe it came from my big bro.
Y-you two!\nStop giggling so much!
Well, I mean, that line was just a little too much, ya know?
Also, even if you have them for reasons\nother than matchmaking,\nthat's okay, right?
Ah...\nI-I suppose that's true.
There are a lot of options. What about the colors?\nThey're all so lovely, I can't decide.
Alrighty!\nUesu%p-2;――%p; Futaro,\nplease choose one too.
Got it.\nI want a color that's not too cute for mine, though.
Okay, how about these red ones over here?
Those are a bit flashy, aren't they?\nThese green ones over here are okay.
I see, they give off a calm impression.
And then, this one...\nI think it's a color that suits you, F-Futaro.
Oh, that's not bad at all.
Something still feels off about Itsuki-chan, though.
